name: Kelsian Group Limited
analysis: KLS has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.2913. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$4.3340 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.2913, stop A$4.0293, target A$4.5000. Risk/reward is 0.80:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
